report_name: Data Breach Hits Texas Hunters and Anglers, Exposing 3 Million Records

identities.name: Texas Parks and Wildlife Department
identities.description: A Texas state agency that disclosed a data breach affecting over 3 million hunting and fishing license holders. The breach occurred at an unnamed third-party vendor responsible for the department's license sales system.

identities.name: Texas hunting and fishing license holders
identities.description: A group of over 3 million individuals whose personally identifiable information (PII), including full names, addresses, phone numbers, driver's license numbers, and passport numbers, was exposed in a supply chain data breach.

relationships.source_name: Texas hunting and fishing license holders
